rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, constants, and assignments
Write output range guarantees using visible feature names and concrete bounds
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers when available to maintain traceability
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Align helper declaration types with expression types to prevent type mismatches
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Use eq for equations and const for constants
Use guarantee for output range contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Avoid unresolved references to AADL properties in AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
Assumed type vs actual type alignment
